case_title: DANIEL CHAVEZ RIVERA VS. YADIRA PEREZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, DANIEL CHAVEZ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO DEC. 27, 2016 AT 10:00 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL AND PROGRESS REPORT. DEFENDANT RETURNED IPAD IN COURT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY RIVERA, DANIEL CHAVEZ PEREZ, YADIRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,590.00 FILED BY RIVERA, DANIEL CHAVEZ AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, YADIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF YADIRA PERES IN RESPONSE TO DANIEL CHAVEZ RIVERA'S CLAIM FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, YADIRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT AND CONTINUED TRIAL TO DEC-27-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL CHAVEZ RIVERA WITH COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER AVELINA PRITCHARD. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT YADIRA PEREZ WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER NORMA MARQUEZ; INTERPRETER'S OATH ADMINISTERED BY CLERK. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. DEFENDANT RETURNED IPAD IN COURT. "COOPERATIVE RESTRAINING ORDER CLINIC" TO ASSIST WITH EXCHANGE OF OTHER PROPERTIES DEFENDANT WILL RETURN TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CAN CALL EMBERLY CROSS FROM "COOPERATIVE RESTRAINING ORDER CLINIC" TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS AS HE DOES NOT HAVE CONTACT NUMBER TO GIVE TO DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-27-2016 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
